seoTitle: Caloundra West vs Camboon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Caloundra West and Camboon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Caloundra West vs Camboon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Caloundra West and Camboon.
heading: Caloundra West vs Camboon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Caloundra West, Queensland and Camboon, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Camboon has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Caloundra West (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Caloundra West or Camboon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Caloundra West has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Camboon scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Caloundra West scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Camboon scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Caloundra West or Camboon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Camboon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
